description: Build the super admin UI pages: user-directory page with full contact details/search/export, feature-control page with per-tenant toggle matrix, and add new sidebar navigation entries. Also update FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md.
steps: 1. Create `app/superadmin/user-directory/page.tsx` - a 'use client' page that: fetches from /api/superadmin/user-directory, shows a table with columns: Avatar+Name, Email, Phone, Tenant(s), Plan, Last Login, Status. Include a search bar (debounced), tenant filter dropdown, and an 'Export CSV' button that downloads all visible users as CSV. Follow the UI pattern from app/superadmin/users/page.tsx (dark theme with border-white/10 styling, Lucide icons).

2. Create `app/superadmin/feature-control/page.tsx` - a 'use client' page that: fetches tenants and their feature overrides from /api/superadmin/feature-control. Display as a matrix/grid: rows are tenants, columns are features from CONTROLLABLE_FEATURES. Each cell is a toggle switch. Toggling calls PATCH /api/superadmin/feature-control. Include a prominent section for 'Telegram Access' with a lock icon showing it's gated. Show tenant plan badge next to each tenant name. Add a filter to show only specific plans.

3. Update `components/superadmin/sidebar.tsx` - add two new nav items: { href: '/superadmin/user-directory', label: 'User Directory', icon: Users, keywords: 'contacts emails phone directory' } in the 'business' section, and { href: '/superadmin/feature-control', label: 'Feature Control', icon: Zap, keywords: 'features toggle telegram gate access' } in the 'config' section. Import Zap from lucide-react if not already.

4. Create loading states: `app/superadmin/user-directory/loading.tsx` and `app/superadmin/feature-control/loading.tsx` - simple skeleton loading components following the pattern of other superadmin pages.

5. Update `FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md` - add a new section '## 2.X Super Admin Feature Control' documenting: the tenant_feature_overrides table, the user-directory API, the feature-control API, the email-blast API, and how the module gate system now checks overrides. Add the new pages to the Superadmin Pages section.
acceptance_criteria: app/superadmin/user-directory/page.tsx renders a searchable, filterable user table with email, phone, tenant info
app/superadmin/feature-control/page.tsx renders a tenant-feature toggle matrix
Sidebar includes links to both new pages
Loading states exist for both new pages
FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md is updated with new super admin capabilities
npm run build passes without TypeScript errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm zero TypeScript errors
Run `npm test` and confirm existing tests still pass
findings: Build passes cleanly. All 435 tests pass. TypeScript strict mode required explicit non-null assertion for array index access after findIndex check. The feature-control page uses CONTROLLABLE_FEATURES imported from lib/modules/feature-keys.ts created in FEAT-001.
